What We Offer

Tailored
For Every
Occasion

  • 01

    Airport Transfers

    JFK, LaGuardia & Newark. Flight tracking, meet & greet, waiting time included.

    →
  • 02

    Corporate Travel

    Seamless executive transportation for meetings, roadshows, and daily commutes.

    →
  • 03

    Events & Galas

    Red carpet arrivals, weddings, Broadway shows, and private NYC events.

    →
  • 04

    City Tours

    Explore New York in unparalleled comfort with a knowledgeable private chauffeur.

    →
  • 05

    Hourly As-Directed

    Your personal driver, available by the hour for complete city flexibility.

    →

Reservations

Reserve
Your Ride
Today

Every booking is confirmed within minutes, backed by our guarantee of punctuality and discretion. Your comfort is our command.

✈

Flight Tracking Included

We monitor your flight in real-time. No extra charges for delays.

◆

Flat Rate Pricing

Transparent pricing, no surge, no surprises. Quoted upfront.

☎

24/7 Concierge

A real person, available around the clock, every day of the year.

Book a Reservation

IMPERIAL
12+Years of Excellence
Our Story

New York's
Standard of
Luxury

Founded on the streets of Manhattan in 2013, Imperial Limousine was built on a singular conviction: that true luxury is found in the details. From the temperature of your cabin to the silence of your journey, every element is curated with intention.

Our fleet of all-black vehicles — impeccably maintained and driven by livery-licensed professionals — serves the city's most discerning clients, from Wall Street executives to visiting heads of state.

Discretion

Your privacy is sacred. We never discuss our clients.

Punctuality

We don't just meet your schedule — we anticipate it.

Presentation

Uniformed, immaculate, and always professional.

Reliability

Available 24/7, 365 days a year, rain or shine.

Client Testimonials

Trusted by New York's
Most Demanding

"★★★★★

Imperial Limousine is the only car service I trust when I have clients in from overseas. Impeccably dressed driver, spotless Escalade, and they handled my client's tight airport connection without a single issue.

M
Marcus T.Managing Director, Midtown Finance
"★★★★★

We used Imperial Limousine for our entire wedding weekend — from rehearsal dinner to the post-reception send-off. The coordination was flawless. The S-Class was gorgeous. Every guest was impressed.

S
Serena & DavidTribeca Wedding, September 2024
"★★★★★

I've had car services across 40 cities. Imperial Limousine is simply the best in New York. The driver knew my preferences before I said a word — quiet, climate-controlled, and waiting exactly where I needed him.

R
Rebecca L.Partner, Upper East Side Law Firm
